meta.title: From One Invite to 87 Women
meta.description:
This wasn’t about tech. It was about what happens when someone opens the door—and keeps holding it open.

From a handwritten opt-in to a computer science class to her first major conference talk at S4, this Unsolicited Response is a reminder that representation in our industry didn’t happen by accident.

87 women at the S4x25 dinner. 10 scholarship recipients. And a community that's stronger for it.
